title: Warped Villager Outpost
description: Adds a Villager Outpost to the Warped Forest biome
body:
### Warped Villager Outpost

**This mod adds a Villager Outpost to the Warped Forest biome.**

Villagers of different professions live and trade inside this Nether outpost.
![Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be119801bc5bcb67f60bac908f367e5a5fe29080.jpeg)

- The interior is nicely decorated, and you’ll also find some Nether themed loot in the outpost.
  
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4bfe214ea6834008b7be8f382482aee599bdbad.jpeg)

- Upstairs, the outpost also features a respawn anchor room.

![Upstairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e352fcd40d395e3cadd3fd6446e9c6b77325003.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1235c6044d7c9f3176432884c8a7cfcfdeeb27d2.jpeg)



 

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
